name: revit-solution
description: Build and maintain Revit add-in projects with Nice3point.Revit.Sdk and Nice3point.Revit.Templates.

interface.longDescription: Reusable workflows for new Revit project scaffolding and existing SDK-driven add-in configuration, multi-version builds, dependencies, debugging, publishing, bundles, and template migration.
defaultPrompt: Use Revit Solution to scaffold or configure a multi-version Revit add-in.
